titleStmt.title: SII 16.234: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 234. (A.R. No. 394 of 1920.) GUNTAKALLU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the K·πõish·πáasvƒÅmin temple.
This is dated ≈öaka 14[80], KƒÅ·∏∑ayukti, KƒÅrtika ≈õu. 12, corresponding to 1558 A.D., October 24.

It records a gift of land to the mannevƒÅru, mƒì·∏∑avƒÅru, nƒÅgasvarƒÅlavƒÅru and uyyƒÅlasƒìvavƒÅru for services in the temple of Kƒì≈õavaperumƒÅ·∏∑ in Guntakallu in Gutti-sƒ´ma by MahƒÅma·πá·∏çalƒì≈õvara MƒÅ·∏çrƒÅju Vallabhayya. Gutti-sƒ´ma is said to have been held by the donor as nƒÅya·πÖkara from MahƒÅma·πá·∏çalƒì≈õvara RƒÅmarƒÅju TirumalarƒÅjadƒìva-mahƒÅrƒÅju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
